commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the protected maintainer label, draft state, missing proof, and feed-schema compatibility decision are not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff changes JSON metadata, parser logic, and tests only; no dependency, workflow, secret, install-script, downloaded artifact, or package-resolution security concern was found. (sha=44c0884c3edcaa07ea94d5f82624fe99b3f532b7)
commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps the bundled official external plugin catalog in schemaVersion 1 feed metadata and updates parser/tests to accept that wrapper while rejecting unsupported versioned wrappers.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +51, Other +5. Total +96 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an internal feature/refactor PR rather than a bug report with a current-main failure. Current main and v2026.6.9 were checked to confirm the feed wrapper is new work, not an already-shipped behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the protected maintainer label, draft state, missing proof, and feed-schema compatibility decision are not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Refactor external plugin catalog toward feeds
target.body:
<!-- hosted-feeds-stack-context:start -->
## Hosted feeds stack context

This PR is PR1 in the hosted feeds implementation stack. The stack implements the model proposed in [RFC 19](https://github.com/openclaw/rfcs/pull/19).

Review order:
- [RFC 19](https://github.com/openclaw/rfcs/pull/19): hosted feeds for plugins and skills
- [#95846](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95846) PR1: feed-shaped bundled fallback
- [#95868](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95868) PR2: guarded hosted fetch
- [#95877](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95877) PR3: last-known-good snapshot fallback
- [#95964](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95964) PR4: persistent SQLite snapshots
- [#95969](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95969) PR5: local source profile validation
- [#95981](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95981) PR6: OpenClaw config profiles

This PR's role: Refactors the existing file-backed external plugin catalog into the feed-shaped data model while preserving bundled/offline behavior.

Stack boundaries: the current stack is catalog plumbing only. It does not auto-install packages, does not switch installer registries, does not execute feed/source auth, and does not enforce signed feed envelopes yet. Those are later slices after Vince and the maintainers are happy with the core fallback and profile model.
<!-- hosted-feeds-stack-context:end -->

## Journey Context

This is step 1 of the hosted OpenClaw feed path from RFC 19. The stack is [#95846](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95846) -> [#95868](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95868) -> [#95877](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95877). This first PR does the smallest safe prep: it makes the bundled official external plugin catalog look like the feed document we want to host later, while preserving the current local behavior.

## What This PR Does

- Adds feed metadata around `scripts/lib/official-external-plugin-catalog.json` without changing the existing `entries` payload.
- Adds parser/type support for the feed-shaped bundled catalog.
- Preserves legacy local catalog parsing for existing unversioned catalog shapes.
- Fails closed for unsupported versioned feed wrappers so future schema versions do not silently parse as legacy catalogs.

## What This PR Intentionally Does Not Do

This PR does not fetch from `register.openclaw.ai`, add auth, add source profiles, add signed envelopes, add regional selection, add snapshot persistence, change search behavior, or move skills into feeds. Those are separate reviewable slices.

## How To Review

Review this as a mechanical shape change plus compatibility guard. The expected behavior is that existing callers still get the same official external plugin entries from the bundled catalog, but the bundled file is now ready to serve as the local fallback for a hosted feed.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts`
- JSON parse of `scripts/lib/official-external-plugin-catalog.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 timeout 180s node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts` (17 tests at initial PR authoring)
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
